div.style: padding:0; margin:3px; vertical-align:middle; min-width:425px; width:fit-content; display:inline-block
margin:0; padding: 10px; border-style:solid; border-width:0 0 0 3px; border-radius:5px; border-color:#a2dae3; background-color:#d1ecf1; color:#09414a;

a.style: margin:0; padding:0; text-decoration:none; border-radius:0; border-style:none; border-color:#008f8c; border-width:0; font-weight:500; width:100%; color:#008f8c; vertical-align: middle; font-size: 15px;
